# arenaml_artifact_store (Data Source)

storage resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the basis

### Read-Only

- `basepath` (String) base path for the store
- `config` (Attributes) configuration for the store (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `created` (String) The timestamp when the basis was created
- `description` (String) A description of the basis
- `disabled` (Boolean) whether the store is disabled
- `endpoint` (String) endpoint URL for the store
- `kind` (String) kind of storage backend
- `name` (String) The unique name of the basis
- `read_only` (Boolean) whether the store is read-only
- `updated` (String) The timestamp when the basis was last updated
- `version` (Number) The version of the basis

<a id="nestedatt--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Read-Only:

- `auth` (String, Sensitive) authentication configuration for the store
- `capacity_gb` (Number) storage capacity in GB
- `max_object_size_mb` (Number) maximum object size in MB
- `max_objects` (Number) maximum number of objects
- `spec` (String) storage specification configuration
